title: ToolMastery 2 (TM2)
description: This mod adds very good armor that is very hard to get
body:
# WELCOME TO TOOLMASTERY 2
## Our new and improved version of ToolMastery  

# WIP

TM2 Adds:
- Zentranium - A new ore that spawns rarely
- Ultra Zentranium - A very strong material made from Zentranium
- The Turtle Masters Shell - A chestplate made of scute and scraps, makes you almost invincible but that thing is HEAVY
- Dragon Nugget - Made from the Dragon egg (can be turned back to dragon egg) that gives you full saturation
- The Tridaxe - A pickaxe made of a trident + a pickaxe, Its very fast and VERY dangerous
- Last but not least we have "Emerald Armor". Mojang didn´t add it, so we did!


## THANKS For 200 DOWNLOADS :D
